reviews.review_description:
Many years ago I learned the "made for video disk" Discover Tai Chi (Scott Cole) routine and the Simply Tai Chi (Graham Bryant & Lorraine James) 9 forms routine, and have wished for a DIY way to learn a 51 form "official" Tai Chi routine.

This app on my Quest 2 looks to be exactly what I hoped for.  It is marked early access but what is there seems fully sufficient for many months of use.  

(Meditation lacks a demonstration master performing the "first two stances", but the audio may be sufficient.  I'm not as keen on the meditation feature at this point.  There are buttons for Level 2 and Level 3 meditation and a Wall Of Knowledge which imply future content will be released in the non-early-access update.)

I do not have a full 11x12 space but to learn the individual stances and movement drills my space is fine.  Combining them in the 51-form practice section will need me to build a new home unfortunately.  Perhaps I can use my back yard.
